title: Spicy nut
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Spicy nuts''' were nuts native to [[Parein II 4/Legends|Parein II 4]]. It was used, along with [[Parein Sweetgreen Fruit|sweetgreen]] and [[Terrberry|terrberriess]] to make an alcoholic beverage known as [[daranu]].

{{Food-stub}}
